function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-10-28
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-10-28                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

next_step.current_state: Invoice migration write succeeded; reactive outbox check is not applicable to this non-outbox finance record. Continue task completion.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter-migrated bill record preserving original body
next_step.observation: Updated the invoice record with schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving the original body text.

function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox item by running both requested finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow: added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the specified invoice and bill, preserved each original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, and then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS when entering folders, inspected /99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before edits, preserved original record bodies exactly during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to run two existing finance records through OCR workflow. Evidence from the two target files provided all required schema fields and line items; finance schema specified required keys; writes succeeded for both files with frontmatter added; inbox-processing workflow and inbox v2 update require deleting completed inbox item, which was done.
